title: ampelopsis aegirophylla
intro: Ampelopsis aegirophylla, also known as the salt cherry vine, is a type of plant that belongs to the grape family (Vitaceae) and is native to China. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ampelopsis aegirophylla include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and capsules, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
